column1: # inject.tsv — the "inject" directive (open="@", no close) over the mini
# test grammar, with rules.open = "val,pair" and a custom action.
# @<key> looks up SRC[key]; at a pair position the looked-up map is
# merged into the surrounding map. SRC = {a:"A", b:{b:1}, c:[2,3]}.
# --- value position: scalar / list / map lookups ---
# --- pair position: the looked-up map merges into the parent ---
